title: senecio faberi
intro: Senecio faberi, also known as Faber's ragwort, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being an expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of Senecio faberi include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Senecio faberi is often made into a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
